description: Letter from someone in ʿAsqalān/Ashqelon to Abū l-Faḍl [...] al-ʿAsqalānī, in Cairo. In Hebrew and/or Judaeo-Arabic with the address in Arabic script. Only a few words from the top of the front side of the letter are preserved.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מאשקלון לקהיר. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
